## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Copy text '...'
3. Open '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or screenshots.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14.x |
| PII Shield version | e.g. v0.1.0 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.x |
| Sidecar mode | Presidio / Fallback (check app logs) |

## Logs

<details>
<summary>Application logs (paste here)</summary>

```
Paste relevant log output here.
On Windows: check Event Viewer or run from terminal to see stdout/stderr.
On macOS: check Console.app or run from terminal.
```

</details>

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (e.g. specific text that triggers the bug, specific browser/app where it fails).
